bead.title: ddx work --watch: warn when rolling claim-success rate falls below threshold
bead.description:
PROBLEM
ddx work --watch on a full queue can sit at loop.idle indefinitely while claiming nothing, with no top-level operator-visible signal — silent idle masquerading as healthy (fizeau, 2026-05-18: 23 ready beads, 0 claims in 30 minutes, empty commit log).

ROOT CAUSE
`cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go` (:86-222) and `cli/cmd/work.go` (:88-101) — the loop did not compute or surface a rolling claim-success rate, so there was no operator-visible warning when claim attempts fail consistently over a window.

PROPOSED FIX
Track claim attempts and successes over a configurable rolling window (`ClaimSuccessRateWindow`, default 10) and emit an operator-visible stderr warning when the rate over a full window is at or below a configurable threshold (`ClaimSuccessRateThreshold`, default 0.0). Expose `--claim-rate-window` and `--claim-rate-threshold` flags on `ddx work`.

NON-SCOPE
Does NOT cover the decoder (decoder child), the schema gate (schema child), or the same-fingerprint escalation (escalation child — a distinct trigger), or README docs (docs child).
bead.acceptance:
1. The loop computes a rolling claim-success rate over `ClaimSuccessRateWindow` (default 10) and emits an operator-visible stderr warning when the rate over a full window is at or below `ClaimSuccessRateThreshold` (default 0.0). Asserted by `TestExecuteBeadLoop_ClaimSuccessRateWarnsBelowThreshold` in `cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_stay_alive_test.go`.
2. `ddx work` exposes `--claim-rate-window` and `--claim-rate-threshold` flags wired to the loop runtime. Asserted by `TestWorkWatchModeFlagsArePresent` in `cli/cmd/work_test.go`.
3. cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./cmd/... green
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes
